IRM
When Mercury passes through the stars Sravana, Dhanistha,
Rohipl, Mrgasiras and Uttarasadha and thus cuts them across, he
creates drought, diseases and panic.
[Cf. WTT—
qqr ^ sr^rr n
Here we have to note the wording in the text and in
Kasyapa's work. This should make us believe that the untoward
effects mentioned here would take place only if mercury cuts across
the particular asterisms, and not otherwise.]

Mercury's Transit VII 75
When Mercury passes through the five constellations beginning
with Ardra, people will be afflicted as a result of clash of arms,
